name: MockERC4626Tester
description: Behavioral mock of a misbehaving ERC4626 vault — configurable per-function reverts (throw/OOG/return-bomb/revert-bomb), yield manipulation (increase/decrease), unbacked share minting, and a settable decimals offset. Subjects an integrator to a vault that drifts and misbehaves.
author: kn0t <terabase7@gmail.com>
